contextvars/ContextVar/get.name: get
contextvars/ContextVar/get.description: Return a value for the context variable for the current context. If there is no value for the variable in the current context, the method will: return the value of the default argument of the method, if provided; or return the default value for the context variable, if it was created with one; or raise a LookupError.

info.excerpt: Return a value for the context variable for the current context. If there is no value for the variable in the current context, the method will: return the value of the default argument of the method, ...

contextvars/Context/get.name: get
contextvars/Context/get.description: Return the value for var if var has the value in the context object. Return default otherwise. If default is not given, return None.

info.excerpt: Return the value for var if var has the value in the context object. Return default otherwise. If default is not given, return None.
